inputs.label: Original Price
inputs.businessContext: The initial price before any discounts.

businessContext_i18n.en: The initial price before any discounts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Herhangi bir indirim öncesindeki başlangıç fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der anfängliche Preis vor etwaigen Rabatten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le prix initial avant toute remise.
businessContext_i18n.es: El precio inicial antes de cualquier descuento.

inputs.label: Additional Discount Percent
inputs.businessContext: An extra discount applied after the first discount (e.g., loyalty discount).

businessContext_i18n.en: An extra discount applied after the first discount (e.g., loyalty discount).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlk indirimden sonra uygulanan ek indirim (örneğin, sadakat indirimi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Ein zusätzlicher Rabatt, der nach dem ersten Rabatt gewährt wird (z. B. Treuerabatt).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Une remise supplémentaire appliquée après la première remise (ex. remise de fidélité).
businessContext_i18n.es: Un descuento extra aplicado después del primer descuento (p. ej., descuento por fidelidad).
businessContext_i18n.ar: خصم إضافي يُطبق بعد الخصم الأول (مثل خصم الولاء).

inputs.label: Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Sales tax rate applied to the discounted price.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sales tax rate applied to the discounted price.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İndirimli fiyata uygulanan satış vergisi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mehrwertsteuersatz, der auf den reduzierten Preis angewendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de taxe de vente appliqué au prix après remise.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de impuesto a las ventas aplicada al precio con descuento.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة ضريبة المبيعات المطبقة على السعر بعد الخصم.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
